text:
(a) The governing body of a municipality may prescribe a period of not less than 10 or more than 15 days after the date on which the advertisement for bids is published within which bids may be received.

(b) Bids shall be filed with the municipal secretary or another officer designated by the governing body.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 315. Artificial Lighting
##### § 315.042 — Filing of Bid

(a) The governing body of a municipality may prescribe a period of not less than 10 or more than 15 days after the date on which the advertisement for bids is published within which bids may be received.

(b) Bids shall be filed with the municipal secretary or another officer designated by the governing body.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The governing body of a municipality may prescribe a period of not less than 10 or more than 15 days after the date on which the advertisement for bids is published within which bids may be received.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Bids shall be filed with the municipal secretary or another officer designated by the governing body.
